description: Comprehensive Redis monitoring dashboard using Prometheus metrics from redis_exporter (oliver006/redis_exporter). Covers overview, memory, performance, connections, persistence, replication, keyspace, network, and CPU metrics.
title: Redis Prometheus Monitoring

9b803dbf-f1e0-450c-ab50-5aa49b14fb29.description: Redis instance to filter by (from redis_exporter target)
9b803dbf-f1e0-450c-ab50-5aa49b14fb29.name: redis_instance
9b803dbf-f1e0-450c-ab50-5aa49b14fb29.queryValue:
SELECT JSONExtractString(labels, 'instance') AS `instance`
FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4_1day
WHERE metric_name = 'redis_up'
GROUP BY `instance`
ORDER BY `instance` ASC

widgets.description: Whether the Redis instance is up (1) or down (0)
widgets.title: Redis Up Status

widgets.description: Number of currently connected clients
widgets.title: Connected Clients

widgets.description: Total memory used by Redis in bytes
widgets.title: Used Memory

widgets.description: Time since Redis server started in seconds
widgets.title: Uptime

widgets.description: Redis used memory vs max memory over time
widgets.title: Memory Usage Over Time

widgets.description: Ratio of memory allocated by the OS to memory requested by Redis. Values > 1.5 indicate fragmentation
widgets.title: Memory Fragmentation Ratio

widgets.description: Resident Set Size memory used by Redis as seen by the OS
widgets.title: RSS Memory

widgets.description: Memory used by the dataset (key-value data) excluding overhead
widgets.title: Memory by Dataset

widgets.description: Rate of keys evicted due to maxmemory limit
widgets.title: Evicted Keys

widgets.description: Rate of keys expired due to TTL
widgets.title: Expired Keys

widgets.description: Rate of commands processed by the Redis server
widgets.title: Commands Processed/sec

widgets.description: Instantaneous number of operations per second reported by Redis
widgets.title: Instantaneous Ops/sec

widgets.description: Percentage of successful key lookups (hits / (hits + misses))
widgets.title: Hit Rate

widgets.description: Duration of command execution broken down by command type
widgets.title: Latency by Command

widgets.description: Number of entries in the Redis slowlog
widgets.title: Slowlog Length

widgets.description: Rate of commands executed broken down by command type
widgets.title: Command Calls by Type

widgets.description: Number of connected clients over time
widgets.title: Connected Clients Over Time

widgets.description: Number of clients pending on a blocking call (BLPOP, BRPOP, BRPOPLPUSH, etc.)
widgets.title: Blocked Clients

widgets.description: Rate of new connections received by the Redis server
widgets.title: Connections Received

widgets.description: Rate of connections rejected due to maxclients limit
widgets.title: Rejected Connections

widgets.description: Status of the last RDB background save operation (1=success, 0=failure)
widgets.title: RDB Last Save Status

widgets.description: Number of changes since the last RDB dump
widgets.title: RDB Changes Since Last Save

widgets.description: Duration of the last AOF rewrite operation in seconds
widgets.title: AOF Rewrite Duration

widgets.description: Current size of the AOF file in bytes
widgets.title: AOF Current Size

widgets.description: Role of the Redis instance (master or slave)
widgets.title: Replication Role

widgets.description: Number of connected replica instances
widgets.title: Connected Replicas

widgets.description: Master replication offset indicating the amount of data replicated
widgets.title: Replication Offset

widgets.description: Replication lag of connected replicas in seconds
widgets.title: Replica Lag

widgets.description: Total number of keys per database
widgets.title: Total Keys

widgets.description: Number of keys with an expiry set per database
widgets.title: Keys with Expiry

widgets.description: Rate at which keys are expiring due to TTL
widgets.title: Key Expiry Rate

widgets.description: Rate at which keys are being evicted due to maxmemory policy
widgets.title: Eviction Rate

widgets.description: Rate of bytes received by the Redis server from network
widgets.title: Network Input

widgets.description: Rate of bytes sent by the Redis server to network
widgets.title: Network Output

widgets.description: Number of active pub/sub channels
widgets.title: Pub/Sub Channels

widgets.description: Number of active pub/sub pattern subscriptions
widgets.title: Pub/Sub Patterns

widgets.description: Rate of system CPU consumed by the Redis server
widgets.title: System CPU Usage

widgets.description: Rate of user CPU consumed by the Redis server
widgets.title: User CPU Usage
